name: Case Officer Vernon
description: Task-force lead; paperwork first, warrants when the net is already up.

name: Wire Interceptor Singh
description: SIGINT chaser; lives in metadata and hates dead drops.

name: Tactical Lead Morales
description: Door-kicker when the quiet phase ends; coordinates local assets.

name: Station Chief Ashcroft
description: Runs the residency like a chess clock—quiet cables, loud consequences.

name: Silvia Cross
description: Embassy circuits and charity boards; her smile files better reports than microphones.

name: Dr. Aldric Frost
description: Prototype labs under plausible patents; the blast radius is always someone else's problem.

name: Marksman Orlov
description: Long corridors, longer sightlines; prefers one shot and a clean exit visa.

name: Ghost Thief Valente
description: Slips past seals and stories; when the painting moves, the alarm thinks it's dust.

name: Ministerial Aide Holloway
description: Drafts policy until the ink smells like leverage; never leaves fingerprints on the brief.

name: Armorer Beck
description: Quartermaster energy—catalog numbers for toys that were never supposed to exist.

name: Casino Fixer Lombard
description: Monte Carlo carpet and velvet rope leverage; the house always texts him first.
